guidance: New 6 GW integrated cell+module plant at Devanahalli; ₹3,306 cr loan sanctioned.
Targeting 16.3 GW modules, 8.9 GW cells by FY27.
Ingot-wafer backward integration ~9 GW planned, first facility FY29.
insights: FY26 revenue ₹5,049 cr (+116%), EBITDA ₹1,734 cr (34% margin), PAT ₹1,082 cr (+193%).
Module capacity 10.3 GW, cell 2.94 GW as of Mar-2026; 100% TOPCon.
Q4 PAT ₹392 cr (+89% YoY); cell utilisation 79% in Q4.
Nov-2025 IPO raised ₹2,900 cr; ₹1,621 cr debt repaid; net cash.
